classes.name: Warrior
classes.signature_bonus: Combo hits build rage for stronger melee swings.

classes.name: Shieldbearer
classes.signature_bonus: Perfect blocks release a short shockwave.

classes.name: Archer
classes.signature_bonus: Some arrows split after traveling a short distance.

classes.name: Sniper
classes.signature_bonus: Standing still charges the next shot into a critical hit.

classes.name: Mage
classes.signature_bonus: Elemental spells leave lingering terrain effects.

classes.name: Summoner
classes.signature_bonus: Minions gain new traits from the current biome.

classes.name: Alchemist
classes.signature_bonus: Thrown flasks can combine into stronger reactions.

classes.name: Engineer
classes.signature_bonus: Placed devices link together for stronger effects.

classes.name: Memory Reaper
classes.signature_bonus: Damage rises as health falls, but healing becomes weaker.
